title: View-Only UI Mode
description: The system shall hide all editing UI elements (such as 'New Tick', 'Edit', 'Delete' buttons, and input forms) when a user views a campaign they do not own or are not logged in.
acceptance_criteria: Users who are not logged in do not see any edit controls.
Logged-in users who do not own the current campaign do not see any edit controls.
The UI seamlessly operates in read-only mode for viewers.
